aboutGwp.title: About the Great White Project
aboutGwp.heading: Tracking Great Whites in New Zealand

sections.content: The Great White Project is dedicated to tracking and studying Great White Sharks in New Zealand.

items: They can grow up to 6 meters (20 feet) in length.
They have an exceptional sense of smell.
They can detect electromagnetic fields in the water.

sections.content: Conservation is crucial to protect Great White Sharks from extinction.

items: Banning shark finning and illegal fishing.
Educating the public about their importance.

sections.content: Our team uses satellite tracking to study migration patterns.
This data helps us predict shark movements and prevent conflicts with humans.
